_comment_File_Name: --- Hidden WebUI-only manifest. You can rename this file later and then only change WEBUI_UPDATE_MANIFEST_URL inside Control Webui_proper_update_v2.py ---
_comment_Step_1: --- WebUI main version. Change this when you launch a new WebUI build ---
_comment_Step_2: --- WebUI name shown in About & Update Version ---
_comment_Step_3: --- WebUI update package URL. GitHub / Hugging Face / Drive direct link can be used ---
_comment_Step_6: --- If true, force WebUI update popup stays until user updates ---
_comment_Step_7: --- If false, lock app when online ---
maintenance_message: Service is temporarily paused. Please try again later.
notice_text: A new WebUI update is available.
_comment_Step_14: --- Success title after matching version is installed ---
_comment_Step_15: --- Success message after matching version is installed ---
success_message: Congratulations! Your WebUI has been updated successfully.
custom_note_1: You can safely add more notes here.
custom_note_2: You can rename the manifest later if you update the URL in Python.
